subcodes.first_line: Mortal charm shall fade away, roses shall give way to thorns, and beauty and youth shall live their day and be no more.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون جمال حقیقت حسنها زائل گردد و گلها خار برویاند
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
